name: 5.63 fl oz Easter Bunny Tea Cup with Saucer - Threshold™
description:
Elevate any tea or coffee moment with the Easter Bunny Tea Cup with Saucer from Threshold™. This set includes a tea cup featuring red floral prints in the center and outer rim along with a tiny bunny accent hanging from the rim. It also comes with a saucer adorned with a beautiful red print along the edge. Made of stoneware, this cup and saucer set is also microwave and dishwasher safe for easy reheating and cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
